Live: League One Volleyball
programme.desc: From Berry Center of Northwest Houston in Cypress, Texas.
Chimney is determined to find a missing Maddie amongst the chaos of St. Patrick's Day.

Athena investigates a robbery at a gas station; Bobby and the 126 race to rescue a novice diver who panics while in a shark cage; Eddie reaches his breaking point; Maddie shares some news with Buck, who realizes he has to come clean with Taylor.

The members of the 118 race into action when a woman falls over her balcony; Athena investigates when a bike rider is impaled on a stop sign; Eddie begins his therapy for his PTSD and survivor's guilt; Maddie fears the worst when Jee-Yun falls ill.

A social media influencer has an accident in a sauna; an emergency at a reality show wedding; a tragedy when a mother and her daughter go hiking; Maddie worries she has missed too many firsts with Jee-Yun.

The 118 races to the rescue when the call center goes up in flames; Bobby risks his life to save a trapped May and Claudette; Buck and Eddie must help an injured electrician; Chimney and his brother team up as firefighters for the first time.

After a mysterious death, Hen and Chimney put their lives in danger when they suspect that someone is playing God to make themselves look like a hero; Eddie visits Texas, where he attempts to reconcile with his father.

programme.desc: When the detectives investigate the death of a Romanian immigrant, suspicions surface that she is alive and masquerading as her twin.

programme.desc: The Superstars of World Wrestling Entertainment display their skills and athleticism in weekly episodic programming, as scores are settled and enduring rivalries play out in the ring.

programme.title: The Circus
programme.desc: The Tramp is hired by the proprietor of a circus after he stumbles into the middle of a performance and becomes the star attraction. He ends up falling in love with a horse rider.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: Realising that Sam has still not come to terms with his wife Maggie's death, his eight-year-old son Jonah forces him to call a national radio talk show, with the hopes of finding him a companion.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget gets uncomfortable in her relationship with Mark after learning that he is averse to change and holds traditional values. She also struggles to deal with her new boss.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet
programme.desc: Sophie, an aspiring writer assisted by the secretaries of Juliet, sets out to unite Claire with her long-lost love. While on her journey, she finds herself drawn to Claire's grandson.

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: The heir to a political dynasty falls for a hotel maid who is also single mother, thinking of her to be a socialite. However, both realise that they are completely different as the truth comes out.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: Greg Focker and his fiancée Pam decide to make their respective parents meet before their wedding. However, the Fockers' relaxed attitude does not go down well with Pam's family.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: An advice columnist attempts to make a man dump her in 10 days, but he makes a bet with his boss that he will make her fall in love with him.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Milly and Jess find their lifelong friendship and lives turned upside down when Milly gets diagnosed with breast cancer while Jess is trying to start a family.

programme.title: Fun With Dick and Jane
programme.desc: When Dick's employer goes bankrupt, he and his wife, Jane, go broke and look for ways to make ends meet. Eventually, they resort to crime and decide to rob a crooked CEO to get their money back.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: A spirited rivalry grows when Peter pushes boundaries with Thomas McGregor, creating chaos around Bea as she offers calm reassurance amid playful tension and shifting intentions.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN

programme.title: SATU CINTA DI BAWAH POHON RINDANG
programme.desc: Because she wanted to escape from an arranged marriage, Sarah disturbed Dito, who was cutting a customer's hair under a tree. But Sarah's beauty changed everything, and Dito fell in love at first sight. Would Sarah want to be with Dito, who was just a barber?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ditemenin, Dibaperin, Abis Itu Dibucinin
programme.desc: Olive (Nabila Zavira), who was forced by her Mami to immediately introduce her future husband, suddenly asked for help from a parking attendant at the mall, Erlan (Masaji Wijayanto). At first Erlan refuses, but as Olive continues to insist, Erlan melts.

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAP!

programme.title: RAYUAN PEDAS NONA CABE
programme.desc: Since his mother died, Marvin has been living with Agus, his father, and his new brother, Ramon. Since childhood, Marvin has hated Ramon because he always received gifts from Agus while Marvin received punishments, and he never considered Ramon his brother. Eleven years later, Ramon was doing community service at a chili plantation, and one of the farmers was Desi.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day when Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend Rangga (Joshua Otay) with another woman. Dania was shocked because she did not expect her boyfriend to have an affair with another woman behind her back. After that, Dania brooded alone in a park. She said she wished someone would give her a hug when she was vulnerable like that.

programme.title: Status Palsu Cintamu Menyala Abangkuh

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wing-sum is shocked to see Shuk-foon lying on the floor. She is unconscious and her head is bleeding. After performing resuscitation, the doctor points out Shuk-foon is likely to develop paralysis. Sai-hang seizes some opportunity to sell Yam Yuen’s factory and repay his debt.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: Ketika Level Tertinggi Cinta Adalah Soto Ayam
programme.desc: The story of a reckless guy named Raga who struggles to graduate from college because he has become a perpetual student. Raga has to meet a girl named Alin who sells soto and also attends the same college as him.

programme.title: Kuwa Kuwi Dia Mainnya Cantik dan Elegan
programme.desc: After accidentally hitting Wisnu's mother, Kirana hid the incident so she wouldn't be blamed. The encounter brought the two closer together. However, unexpectedly, Wisnu eventually found out that it was Kirana who had hit his mother.

programme.title: Trio Gabut Kursus Iman (Spesial Ramadan)

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.desc: Ayu always uses very strong ngapak or medok language. In her search for her biological father, Ayu meets Beni who constantly questions Ayu's ngapak speaking style.

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of a demonic serial killer, Edgar Reese. However, questions arise when the murders start again, eerily matching the modus operandi of Reese.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Somali pirates attack the Maersk Alabama, a container ship, while it is on its course to Kenya. Richard Phillips, the captain of the ship, uses his wits to negotiate with them to save his crew.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: When Emily's problems continue to haunt her, psychiatrist Jonathan Banks prescribes her a new drug. What follows not only leads to her husband's murder but also threatens to ruin Jonathan's career.

programme.title: Texas Killing Fields
programme.desc: In a small town in Texas, a homicide detective and his partner embark on a challenging mission to arrest a vicious serial killer.

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: In 2003, Harvard University sophomore, Mark Zuckerberg, creates the social networking platform called Facebook. But along with the popularity of the site he also gets dragged into two lawsuits.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: After a devastating accident shatters his world, a once-celebrated champion boxer spirals into a destructive abyss. Subsequently, he decides to fight for his daughter and revive his fading career.

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
programme.desc: Charlie suffers from depression and is nervous about entering high school. However, with the help of two seniors, he learns how to deal with his struggles.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich lands a job as a legal assistant at Ed Masry's law firm. Here, she builds a case against a power company after she learns that they have been polluting a town's water supply.

programme.title: Boychoir
programme.desc: A demanding choir master at an elite East Coast boarding school pushes a gifted but troubled orphan to fulfil his true potential.

programme.title: Puerto Rico Open Round 3
programme.desc: The Puerto Rico Open is the only PGA Tour tournament on the island and the first in the Caribbean. It was first played in 2008. The tournament is played at the Coco Beach Golf Course. As an alternate event, the winner does not earn a bid to the Masters, but still receives a two-year exemption on the PGA Tour and entry into the PGA Championship as a Tour winner.

The tournament will feature a field of 78 PGA TOUR Champions players competing for a purse of $2.2 million dollars. Playing alongside the Champions Tour players will be 26 football legends.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: A life-threatening head injury ended Oliver Glasner's playing career early, but it did nothing to quell his ambition. We go behind-the-scenes to reveal the makings of a manager who has achieved success throughout the past decade in European management, winning European titles in Germany, and the first major silverware in Crystal Palace's 120-year history.

programme.title: PL STORIES
